SECTION: A.4.2  
PROMPT4: SYSTEM-PROMPT FOR MINEFLAYER-JS CODE GENERATION  
CTX: EXAMPLE-PROGRAMS USING MINEFLAYER-API  

DEF: EXPLORE-UNTIL(bot,direction:Vec3{-1|0|1},maxTime=60s,callback)  
  → CALLBACK EACH-SECOND UNTIL NON-NULL ∨ TIMEOUT RETURN null ∨ callback-return  
DEF: MINE-BLOCK(bot,name,count=1)  
  → FIND-BLOCKS(matching:name,maxDistance=32,count) ∧ COLLECT-BLOCKS(targets,ignoreNoPath=true)  
DEF: CRAFT-ITEM(bot,name,count=1)  
  → FIND-BLOCK(matching:crafting_table,maxDistance=32) ∧ PATHFIND(GOAL_LOOK_AT_BLOCK);  
  GET-RECIPE(itemId,1,craftingTable) ∧ CRAFT(recipe,count,craftingTable)  
DEF: PLACE-ITEM(bot,name,position)  
  → FIND-INVENTORY-ITEM(itemId) ∧ FIND-REFERENCE-BLOCK(6 FACE-VECTORS);  
  PATHFIND(GOAL_PLACE_BLOCK) ∧ EQUIP(item,hand) ∧ PLACE-BLOCK(referenceBlock,faceVector)  
DEF: SMELT-ITEM(bot,itemName,fuelName,count=1)  
  → FIND-BLOCK(matching:furnace,maxDistance=32) ∧ PATHFIND(GOAL_LOOK_AT_BLOCK) ∧ OPEN-FURNACE;  
  LOOP count: PUT-FUEL(fuelId), PUT-INPUT(itemId), WAIT 12s, TAKE-OUTPUT ∧ CLOSE-FURNACE  
DEF: KILL-MOB(bot,mobName,timeout=300)  
  → FIND-ENTITY(name=mobName,d<32) ∧ PVP-ATTACK(entity) ∧ PATHFIND(GOAL_BLOCK(entity.pos))  
DEF: GET-ITEM-FROM-CHEST(bot,chestPos,itemsToGet)  
  → MOVE-TO(chestPos) ∧ OPEN-CONTAINER(chestBlock);  
  FOR name∈itemsToGet: WITHDRAW(item.id,null,qty) ∧ CLOSE-CONTAINER  
DEF: DEPOSIT-ITEM-INTO-CHEST(bot,chestPos,itemsToDeposit)  
  → MOVE-TO(chestPos) ∧ OPEN-CONTAINER(chestBlock);  
  FOR name∈itemsToDeposit: DEPOSIT(item.id,null,qty) ∧ CLOSE-CONTAINER  
DEF: CHECK-ITEM-INSIDE-CHEST(bot,chestPos)  
  → MOVE-TO(chestPos) ∧ OPEN-CONTAINER(chestBlock) ∧ CLOSE-CONTAINER
